title: fragaria australis
intro: Fragaria australis, also known as the Tasmanian strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Fragaria australis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
